meta.homeDescription: Vienna-based DevOps engineer Hipolit Badowski builds cloud and CI/CD platforms, agentic AI infrastructure, and private local LLM deployments.

hero.eyebrow: Independent DevOps engineer in Vienna · Remote across Europe
hero.title: DevOps Engineer in Vienna.
hero.lede: Infrastructure should be boring. I build cloud platforms, agentic AI infrastructure, and private local LLM systems.
hero.expertise: Cloud platforms · CI/CD · Agentic AI infrastructure · Private local LLMs
hero.portraitAlt: Hipolit Badowski working with a team at a table with laptops

work.title: DevOps and AI infrastructure, end to end.
work.intro: From cloud foundations to production AI: make change safer without making the system heavier.

items.label: Platforms
items.title: Clear foundations.
items.body: Cloud and Kubernetes environments with boundaries teams can understand and own.

items.label: Delivery
items.title: Releases without theatre.
items.body: Reviewable pipelines, useful rollback points, and less manual choreography.

items.label: Operations
items.title: Less guesswork.
items.body: Signals, runbooks, and incident follow-up that help when production gets loud.

items.label: AI infrastructure
items.title: Private by design.
items.body: Agent runtimes and private local LLM systems for controlled environments where models, tools, and data need to stay close.
items.tools: Local inference · Agent runtimes · Model serving · AI observability

project.title: Skill Mania.
project.body: One source of truth for agent skills, packaged for Codex, Claude Code, and GitHub Copilot.

method.title: Understand → simplify → document.
method.body: Small, reviewable changes. Clear rollback. Context left behind.

contact.title: Got a fragile part?
contact.body: Send me the problem. I’ll tell you where I can help—and where I can’t.

notFound.title: This route goes nowhere.
notFound.body: Nothing to debug here. The page moved or never existed.
